# FrootAI MCP Server ‚Äî Complete Reference

> Version 5.0.1 | 45 tools | MIT License
> The open glue for the GenAI ecosystem.

## Overview

FrootAI is an AI infrastructure platform that unifies agents, instructions, skills, hooks, workflows, plugins, and prompts through the FAI Protocol. The MCP server is the primary distribution channel ‚Äî it gives any AI agent instant access to the full ecosystem.

## Architecture

The server runs in two modes:
- **stdio** (default): Local agent communication (VS Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor)
- **HTTP/SSE**: Remote server (`npx frootai-mcp http`) with multi-client sessions, API key auth, health probes

Internal modules:
- `src/knowledge/` ‚Äî Knowledge loading, parsing, search
- `src/tools/` ‚Äî Tool handler implementations (knowledge, ecosystem, engine, scaffold, marketplace)
- `src/prompts/` ‚Äî MCP prompt templates
- `src/resources/` ‚Äî MCP resource definitions (fai:// URIs)
- `src/data/` ‚Äî Static data (models, pricing, patterns)
- `src/middleware/` ‚Äî LRU cache, rate limiter, error handling
- `src/telemetry/` ‚Äî OpenTelemetry integration
- `src/capabilities/` ‚Äî MCP sampling and elicitation
- `src/types/` ‚Äî TypeScript type definitions

## Complete Tool Reference (45 tools)

### Category 1: Static Knowledge (6 tools)
| Tool | Parameters | Description |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| `list_modules` | `layer?: string` | Browse 18 FROOT knowledge modules by layer (F/R/O/T) |
| `get_module` | `module_id: string, section?: string` | Read full module content or a specific section |
| `lookup_term` | `term: string` | Look up any of 200+ AI/ML terms in the glossary |
| `search_knowledge` | `query: string, max_results?: number` | Full-text search across all 18 modules |
| `get_architecture_pattern` | `scenario: string` | Get architecture decision guide (rag_pipeline, agent_hosting, model_selection, cost_optimization, deterministic_ai, multi_agent, fine_tuning_decision) |
| `get_froot_overview` | none | Complete FROOT framework summary with all layers and modules |

### Category 2: Live Tools (4 tools)
| Tool | Parameters | Description |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| `fetch_azure_docs` | `service: string` | Search Microsoft Learn for Azure service documentation |
| `fetch_external_mcp` | `query: string` | Discover MCP servers from public registries |
| `list_community_plays` | `filter?: string` | Browse 100 solution plays from the GitHub repository |
| `get_github_agentic_os` | `primitive?: string` | Get .github Agentic OS guide (overview, instructions, prompts, agents, skills, hooks, workflows, plugins) |

### Category 3: Agent Chain (3 tools)
| Tool | Parameters | Description |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| `agent_build` | `task: string` | Architecture guidance + code patterns for building AI solutions |
| `agent_review` | `context?: string` | Security + quality + compliance audit checklist |
| `agent_tune` | `context?: string` | Production readiness validation and verdict |

### Category 4: Ecosystem (10 tools)
| Tool | Parameters | Description |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| `get_model_catalog` | `category?: string` | Azure AI model catalog with pricing (gpt, embedding, image, speech) |
| `get_azure_pricing` | `scenario: string, scale?: string` | Monthly cost estimates by scenario and scale |
| `estimate_cost` | `play: string, scale?: string` | Itemized Azure cost estimate per solution play |
| `compare_models` | `useCase: string, priority?: string` | Side-by-side model comparison for a use case |
| `compare_plays` | `plays: string` | Compare 2-3 solution plays (services, cost, complexity) |
| `semantic_search_plays` | `query: string, top_k?: number` | Natural language search across 100 solution plays |
| `embedding_playground` | `text1: string, text2: string` | Cosine similarity between two texts (educational) |
| `run_evaluation` | `scores: object, thresholds?: object` | Quality scoring with configurable pass/fail |
| `validate_config` | `config_type: string, config_content: string` | Validate TuneKit configs against best practices |
| `generate_architecture_diagram` | `play: string` | Generate Mermaid.js architecture diagram for any play |

### Category 5: FAI Engine (6 tools)
| Tool | Parameters | Description |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| `wire_play` | `playId: string` | Resolve FAI Protocol context, bind primitives, activate guardrails |
| `inspect_wiring` | `playId: string` | Audit a play's wiring ‚Äî primitives, context, health score |
| `validate_manifest` | `playId: string` | Validate fai-manifest.json schema + completeness |
| `get_play_detail` | `play_number: string` | Full play spec ‚Äî services, config, WAF alignment |
| `list_primitives` | `type: string, limit?: number` | Browse 860+ primitives by type |
| `evaluate_quality` | `scores: object, thresholds?: object, play?: string` | Run quality evaluation with pass/fail thresholds |

### Category 6: Scaffold (3 tools)
| Tool | Parameters | Description |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| `scaffold_play` | `name: string, model?: string, wafPillars?: string[], dryRun?: boolean` | Generate complete solution play (24+ files) with FAI Protocol auto-wired |
| `create_primitive` | `type: string, name: string, description?: string, waf?: string[]` | Create an agent, instruction, or skill with proper frontmatter |
| `smart_scaffold` | `query: string, top_k?: number` | Semantic search to find best matching play then scaffold it |

### Category 7: Marketplace (13 tools)
| Tool | Parameters | Description |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| `marketplace_search` | `query: string, limit?: number` | Semantic search across 77+ plugins by use case |
| `marketplace_browse` | `page?: number, perPage?: number, category?: string` | Paginated listing with 8 category filters |
| `install_plugin` | `pluginName: string, projectRoot?: string` | Copy plugin primitives into .github/ with conflict detection |
| `uninstall_plugin` | `pluginName: string, projectRoot?: string` | Remove plugin primitives from project |
| `list_installed` | `projectRoot?: string` | Scan .github/ and match against marketplace |
| `check_compatibility` | `pluginName: string, playId?: string` | Validate plugin + play alignment + WAF + conflicts |
| `validate_plugin` | `pluginPath: string` | Check plugin.json schema, naming, file refs |
| `compose_plugins` | `plugins: string[]` | Multi-install with cross-plugin conflict detection |
| `publish_plugin` | `pluginPath: string` | Validate ‚Üí generate marketplace entry ‚Üí register |
| `check_plugin_updates` | `projectRoot?: string` | Compare installed vs marketplace versions |
| `resolve_dependencies` | `plugins: string[]` | Topological dependency resolution + install order |
| `list_external_plugins` | none | Browse community-plugins/ and external sources |
| `marketplace_stats` | none | Full analytics: totals, categories, top plugins, coverage |

## MCP Resources (fai:// URIs)
- `fai://overview` ‚Äî Ecosystem summary
- `fai://module/{F1..T3}` ‚Äî 16 knowledge modules as markdown
- `fai://schema/{name}` ‚Äî 7 FAI Protocol JSON schemas
- `fai://marketplace` ‚Äî Full plugin registry
- `fai://tools` ‚Äî Tool catalog as JSON
- `fai://waf` ‚Äî WAF 6 pillars reference

## MCP Prompts
- `/build {task}` ‚Äî Start the builder workflow
- `/review {context}` ‚Äî Security + quality audit
- `/tune {context}` ‚Äî Production readiness check
- `/wire {playId}` ‚Äî Wire a play through FAI Protocol
- `/design {requirements}` ‚Äî Guided architecture design
- `/cost {play} {scale}` ‚Äî Azure cost estimation

## FAI Protocol
The FAI Protocol (`fai-manifest.json`) is the context-wiring spec that binds all AI primitives together. When you `wire_play`, the engine reads the manifest, resolves all primitive paths, builds the context chain, and activates guardrails.

## Configuration
| Env Variable | Description | Default |
|-------------|-------------|---------|
| `PORT` | HTTP server port | 3000 |
| `FAI_AUTH_MODE` | Auth mode: `none` or `apikey` | none |
| `FAI_API_KEYS` | Comma-separated API keys | ‚Äî |
| `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` | OpenTelemetry endpoint | ‚Äî |

- Website: https://frootai.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/frootai/frootai
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/frootai-mcp
- Setup: https://frootai.dev/setup-guide
- MCP Tools: https://frootai.dev/mcp-tooling
